Soffritto is the backbone of Italian cooking. Equal parts onion, celery, and
carrot, cooked slowly in olive oil until completely soft and sweet. Never brown
— the goal is a melting, fragrant base.

## Ratios

- 2 parts onion
- 1 part celery
- 1 part carrot

## Method

Dice all vegetables finely and uniformly. Heat olive oil in a heavy pan over the
lowest heat your stove allows. Add the vegetables and a pinch of salt. Cook for
30-40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until completely soft and beginning to
turn golden at the edges.
